---
title: ""
image: images/profile.jpg
toc: false

about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 14em
  links:
    - icon: twitter-x
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/iremmdastan
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/IremDastan
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:iremdastannn@gmail.com
---

I am a PhD candidate in finance.

This website is a collection of my study notes, research ideas, and ongoing work. I share materials that I found useful during my PhD journey, including conceptual frameworks, derivations, and interpretations of core topics.

From time to time, I also organize and discuss important papers.

The goal is simple: to think clearly, learn deeply, and document the process.
